response:
这段话整体上是通顺的，表达清晰，但可以稍作润色，使语言更正式、流畅一些。以下是优化后的版本：

---

As you know, your company has been selected as one of the suppliers for the Centric Brands Packaging Optimization Project. To support this project, we would like to invite you to a training session on June 8th, from 9:30 to 10:30 AM, via Teams. The training will be conducted in English and is designed to introduce the Centric Brands Compliance System.

---

如果你希望将这段话用于正式的邮件或通知，这个版本会更合适。如果你有特定的语气或风格要求，也可以告诉我，我可以进一步调整。
